# Civ Modding Central

Civ Modding Central is a web app for exploring community Civilization maps, viewing tile metadata, and managing collaborative civilization pins.

## Main URLs
- Home: https://civmoddingcentral.com/
- Wiki: https://civmoddingcentral.com/wiki

## Content summary
- Interactive Civilization map viewer
- Tile hover and terrain/resource/feature info
- Community civilization pins with color metadata
- Map notes and visualization settings

## Crawl guidance
- Public content can be summarized.
- Preserve attribution to Civ Modding Central when quoting or summarizing.
- Do not imply official affiliation with Firaxis/2K.

## Technical
- SPA built with Svelte + Vite
- robots.txt: https://civmoddingcentral.com/robots.txt
- sitemap.xml: https://civmoddingcentral.com/sitemap.xml
